In the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, (i) in Schedule I, at Serial number 55 relating to Common Effluent Treatment Plants : B. Treated Effluent Quality of Common Effluent Treatment Plant, at parameter relating to ‘Oil and Grease’ (Concentration in mg/1) for disposal into Marine Coastal areas, for the figure “20”, the figure “10” shall be substituted; (ii) in Schedule VI relating to General Standards for Discharge of Environmental Pollutants, Part A : Effluents, at serial number 7, at parameter relating to *Oiland Grease’ (mg/l max.), in column number 3(d), for the figure “20”, the figure “10” shall be substituted. [F. No.Q-15017/01/2004-CPW] RAJNEESH DUBE, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide number S.0. 844(E), dated the 19th November, 1986; and subsequently amended vide 8.0.433(E), dated 18th April 1987; and recently amended vide G.S.R. 97(E), dated the 18th February, 2009; G.S.R. 149(E). dated the 4th March, 2009; G.S.R. 512(E), dated the 9th July. 2009, G.S.R. 543(E), dated the 22nd July, 2009; G.S.R. 595(E), dated the 21st August, 2009; G.S.R. 794(E), dated the 4th November, 2009; G.S.R. 826(E), dated the 16th November, 2009, G.S.R. 1(E), dated the st January, 2010; G.S.R. 61(E), dated the 5th February, 2010; G.S.R. 485(E), dated 9th June, 2010; and G.S.R. 608(E), dated the 21st July, 2010, and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054, -- 2 of 2 --
